coordinated_same_wrong_mutation.operation: change obligation, fixture oracle, row fingerprint, and internal digest together while retaining the trusted verifier and detached digest

positive_fixtures.oracle: Evaluate subexpressions exactly once in source order.
Drop full-expression temporaries in reverse completion order.
Complete RHS before dropping and replacing the old place value.
Initialize construction fields in row/source order and roll back completed fields in reverse order.
Evaluate a projection source once and project in target-row order under declared ownership.
Evaluate Option coalescing lhs once and rhs only for none.
Insert at most one outer some only for an independently fixed local target.
Normalize unit dimensions and rational scale exactly before equality or conversion.
Evaluate library static lets in deterministic dependency order and commit each once.
Select exactly one admitted entry and project host status only after cleanup.
Retain the first escaping failure and append cleanup failures in execution order.
Cancellation is cooperative and never bypasses lexical cleanup.
A task scope joins or cancels all owned children before exit.
Actor mailboxes preserve sender-to-receiver FIFO without promising global sender order.
Numeric operations follow their declared checked/static responsibility without hidden widening.
NumericArray operations preserve source evaluation order, shape checks, and explicit allocation/authority effects.
Evaluate every guard left-to-right once before ownership commit or payload evaluation; a false guard evaluates no payload.
A multi-statement local value body produces a value with local ret on every reachable normal path.
Only the final loop transfer target executes and observes its outcome handler after intermediate cleanup.
Preserve callable lifetime, call-right, environment, and behavior responsibility across type checking, API digest, and lowering.
Invoke def#cleanup exactly once for initialized non-moved state, never by direct call, while preserving primary and suppressed failure order.
Resolve a root conformance evidence selector to exactly one visible coherent nominal conformance without constructing a first-class witness value.
Keep declaration-side *** collection distinct from call-side ** named unfolding in parsing, typing, and API residue.
